description: Government/public sector SOW with FAR clauses, firm-fixed-price, federal agency as client
parsed_text:
STATEMENT OF WORK
Contract Number: W91CRB-25-C-0042
Solicitation Number: W91CRB-25-R-0031

This Statement of Work ("SOW") is incorporated into and made part of Contract No. W91CRB-25-C-0042 between:

U.S. Army Corps of Engineers, Omaha District ("Government" or "Client")
1616 Capitol Avenue
Omaha, NE 68102
Contracting Officer: Major Linda Forsythe (COR: Dr. Samuel Reyes)

and

Apex Environmental Consulting, LLC ("Contractor" or "Vendor")
901 Farnam Street, Suite 400
Omaha, NE 68102
Contractor Contact: James Bergeron, Program Manager

SOW Title: Environmental Site Assessment and Remediation Design Services — Fort Pemberton Training Area

1. PURPOSE AND BACKGROUND
The U.S. Army Corps of Engineers, Omaha District requires environmental consulting services to conduct a Phase II Environmental Site Assessment (ESA), prepare a Remedial Investigation/Feasibility Study (RI/FS) report, and develop a Remediation Action Plan (RAP) for the Fort Pemberton Training Area in accordance with CERCLA requirements and applicable EPA guidance.

2. PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE
Base Period: June 1, 2025 through May 31, 2026
Option Period I (if exercised): June 1, 2026 through May 31, 2027

3. DELIVERABLES AND SCHEDULE

CLIN 0001 — Phase II ESA Report
Description: Comprehensive Phase II Environmental Site Assessment including soil and groundwater sampling, laboratory analysis, and findings report consistent with ASTM E1903 standards.
Delivery: October 31, 2025

CLIN 0002 — Remedial Investigation / Feasibility Study (RI/FS) Report
Description: RI/FS report analyzing nature and extent of contamination, exposure pathways, and feasibility of remediation alternatives per EPA guidance for CERCLA sites.
Delivery: February 28, 2026

CLIN 0003 — Remediation Action Plan (RAP)
Description: Detailed Remediation Action Plan including selected remedy, cost estimate, schedule, and implementation specifications.
Delivery: May 31, 2026

4. CONTRACT TYPE AND PRICING
Contract Type: Firm-Fixed-Price (FFP)
Pricing Model: Fixed
CLIN 0001 Amount: $185,000.00
CLIN 0002 Amount: $220,000.00
CLIN 0003 Amount: $95,000.00
Total Base Period Contract Value: $500,000.00 USD
Option Period I Value (if exercised): $145,000.00
Currency: USD

5. PAYMENT
Payment Terms: Net 30 days from Government acceptance of each CLIN deliverable per FAR 52.232-25 (Prompt Payment).
Payment Schedule: Payment per CLIN upon Government Contracting Officer Representative (COR) acceptance of each deliverable.

6. INCORPORATED FAR/DFARS CLAUSES
This contract incorporates the following clauses by reference:
- FAR 52.204-10: Reporting Executive Compensation and First-Tier Subcontract Awards
- FAR 52.222-26: Equal Opportunity
- FAR 52.227-14: Rights in Data — General (Alternate II)
- FAR 52.232-25: Prompt Payment
- DFARS 252.204-7012: Safeguarding Covered Defense Information

7. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY / DATA RIGHTS
Pursuant to FAR 52.227-14 (Alternate II), the Government retains unlimited rights to all data, reports, deliverables, and technical data packages generated under this contract. Contractor retains no proprietary rights in deliverables funded entirely by this contract.

8. ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA
The COR shall review and accept or reject each CLIN deliverable within fifteen (15) business days of receipt. Rejection shall be accompanied by written technical comments. Contractor shall address comments and resubmit within ten (10) business days.

9. CHANGE ORDER / MODIFICATION PROCESS
Any change to the scope, price, or schedule of this contract shall be effected only by a bilateral contract modification (Mod) executed by the Contracting Officer in accordance with FAR Part 43.

U.S. Army Corps of Engineers                     Apex Environmental Consulting, LLC
By: /s/ Major Linda Forsythe                     By: /s/ James Bergeron
Name: Major Linda Forsythe                       Name: James Bergeron
Title: Contracting Officer                       Title: Program Manager
Date: May 20, 2025                               Date: May 20, 2025
